title: Password reset via account email
text: Users can reset a forgotten password from the sign-in page. A reset link is sent to the verified account email address and expires after 30 minutes.

title: MFA recovery process
text: If a user loses access to the authenticator app, recovery codes may be used. If recovery codes are unavailable, identity verification is required before MFA can be reset.

title: Billing dispute review
text: Billing disputes are reviewed by the finance operations team within five business days. Supporting invoices and transaction identifiers must be attached.

title: Refund eligibility
text: Refunds are available for duplicate charges and failed renewals. Requests must be submitted within 14 calendar days of the original payment.

title: Access revocation after offboarding
text: Repository, VPN and admin tool access must be revoked on the employee's last working day. The responsible manager initiates the offboarding workflow.

title: Audit log retention
text: Security audit logs are retained for 365 days in the central logging platform. Access to logs is restricted to authorized security and compliance personnel.

title: Priority incident escalation
text: SEV-1 incidents must be escalated immediately to the incident commander and on-call engineering lead. Customer support opens the incident bridge within 10 minutes.

title: Account suspension policy
text: Accounts may be suspended for repeated payment failures, confirmed abuse, or severe policy violations. Users receive an email notice unless legal restrictions apply.
